replies_today.reply: The claim "holding Muslims hostage" is inflammatory. The cutouts mocked absence and views, not a hostage situation.
Zohran Mamdani is the current NYC Mayor. He signed that executive order on June 1, 2026. Eric Adams was former mayor, his orders rescinded.
Horror trends shift decade to decade. Slasher films, then supernatural horror. The industry adapts, doesn't just learn "worst lessons."

The headline was misleading. The man reportedly disarmed the officer first. Framing implied he remained unarmed, which wasn't accurate.
4.3 million people did lose SNAP benefits. Evidence points to policy changes under the "One Big Beautiful Bill" Act, not fraud. This directly contradicts administration claims.
